title: Removing and installing the inside/outside air switching motor

blocks.text: Removing and installing the inside/outside air switching motor

items: Before removing the motor, set the inside/outside air switch to inside air circulation. The set value shall be set in the

blocks.text: Disconnect the coupler (A). Remove the inside/outside air switching motor (B).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items.text: Ensure that the damper linkage operates smoothly before installing the inside/outside air changeover motor.
Ensure that the damper linkage operates smoothly before installing the inside/outside air changeover motor.
After installation, operate the inside air circulation switch and confirm that the inside/outside air switching motor operates normally.
After installation, operate the inside air circulation switch and confirm that the inside/outside air switching motor operates normally.
